subject: URGENT: Temporary Lock on Your Bank Account - Action Required
body:
Dear Customer,

We detected suspicious login activity on your Chase bank account from an unrecognized IP address in Moscow, Russia.

To protect your funds, we have temporarily suspended online access to your account. You must verify your identity immediately to restore full privileges.

Click the secure link below to verify your details:
http://chase-verification-secure-portal.com/login?token=847a9c

Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in permanent account closure.

Thank you,
Chase Security Team & Risk Prevention Division
